compounds.frequency: twice daily (1 IU before bed, 1 IU in the morning)

side_effects.description: Fasted blood glucose increased by ~10 points when initially taking 2 IU HGH before bed; splitting dose to 1 IU morning and 1 IU evening helped reduce but not fully normalize it

protocol_notes: Initially started at 2 IU HGH before bed, noticed fasted blood glucose rose ~10 points. Switched to split dosing (1 IU AM, 1 IU PM) to mitigate this. Recommends swapping Tirz for Reta at 2-3mg/day or microdosing 750mcg every other day. Notes HGH takes several months to fully work.
